requirement_summary: Random-baseline primary population and dimension-specific common complete cases
notes: Retained instrument-inconsistent responses remain unless fatal for the dimension

requirement_summary: Broad and strict subsets use original pre-adjudication sufficiency ratings
notes: Subset functions have no adjudicated input

requirement_summary: Hard-case sample analysed separately as diagnostic and non-representative
notes: Parser preserves random-baseline versus hard-case sample set; empirical reporting is deferred

requirement_summary: Project-owner stream remains separate and retains recruitment route
notes: Sequence and supplementary routes remain distinct; no empirical responses.

requirement_summary: Adjudication population applies only to protocol-eligible cases
notes: Population reasons are synthetic only; no case has been adjudicated.

requirement_summary: Unclear from Register Entry is an ordinary active primary-analysis label
notes: Unclear is retained as a label while coexistence is flagged

requirement_summary: Domains and purposes use MASI-distance Krippendorff alpha
notes: Self-contained coincidence-matrix implementation

requirement_summary: Calculate alpha_ABC alpha_LBC alpha_ALC and alpha_ABL on one common set
notes: Model substitution is explicit for A B and C

requirement_summary: Calculate delta_A delta_B delta_C and delta_min
notes: Undefined components propagate to differences

requirement_summary: Jointly recalculate linked replacement quantities within every bootstrap sample
notes: One evaluator call receives each sampled project-block sequence

requirement_summary: Binary-tag replacement panels use nominal distance
notes: Full tag reporting is deferred to Batch 2

requirement_summary: Interpret delta_min with interval and broader evidence profile
notes: No pass/fail or release interpretation is implemented

requirement_summary: Broad subset requires two ratings of Sufficient or Partially sufficient
notes: All 27 three-coder combinations tested

requirement_summary: Strict subset requires two Sufficient ratings
notes: All 27 three-coder combinations tested

requirement_summary: Majority-Insufficient records remain in unconditional primary analysis
notes: No primary-population filter uses majority_insufficient

requirement_summary: Exposure-flagged coder-project responses remain primary; report frequency and exclude flagged responses in sensitivity analysis where informative
notes: Exposure flag and restricted source note are preserved and tested; declaration and synthetic QA records are excluded; qualitative note summary only
ambiguity_or_conflict: No source-specific quantitative reporting is promised

requirement_summary: Exact-set equality and project-level Jaccard
notes: Empty-set behaviour is explicit

requirement_summary: Per-label Cohen kappa is not macro-averaged; precision recall and F1 macro eligibility starts at 10 positives
notes: Full metric aggregation remains deferred.

requirement_summary: Per-label precision recall and F1 against majority-human reference
notes: Only the majority-reference primitive is implemented

requirement_summary: Full binary-tag prevalence and agreement diagnostics
notes: No kappa AC1 positive agreement or classification pipeline yet

requirement_summary: Human support is independent two-of-three labelwise aggregation
notes: Purpose majority set may contain more than two labels

requirement_summary: Register-sufficiency distributions and subset sizes by sample
notes: Aggregation deferred until locked outcomes

requirement_summary: Cannot assess is separate from No Fit and excluded from taxonomy-defect denominator
notes: Issue denominator contains Partial Fit and No Fit only

requirement_summary: Unclear use and coherence patterns are diagnostic
notes: Coexistence is retained and flagged

requirement_summary: Diagnostic category majorities require two matching ratings; three-way splits remain No majority / split judgement
notes: No ordering or averaging resolves a split.

requirement_summary: Owner recruitment flow is reported separately by sequence and supplementary route
notes: No real recruitment or responses.

requirement_summary: Proposed-label verdict denominator is completed owner-label verdicts
notes: Response and unique-record denominators remain distinct.

requirement_summary: Unique record-label results distinguish one response concordant responses and mixed responses without majority
notes: No owner-majority classification.

requirement_summary: Combined unique-record results deduplicate records reviewed through both routes
notes: Every completed owner-record response remains represented at response level.

requirement_summary: Fifty-record target and 25-record minimum count sequence-based complete reviews only
notes: Supplementary reviews do not count toward either threshold.

requirement_summary: Adjudication frequencies use completed adjudicated records and issue families are non-mutually-exclusive
notes: No empirical frequencies.

requirement_summary: Stage 1 masks sources deduplicates identical label sets and withholds owner evidence
notes: Owner-only cases receive the production set without an artificial competitor.

requirement_summary: Recurring triggers require two records or independent pre-reveal streams except documented headline escalation
notes: Source-revealed adjudicator confirmation is not a second independent source.

requirement_summary: Support counts use majority-supported random-baseline records only
notes: Hard-case records are not inputs to the support helper

requirement_summary: Fewer than 10 positives is descriptive only
notes: Boundary tests include 0 and 9

requirement_summary: Ten to 29 positives requires interval and caution
notes: Full metric reporting deferred

requirement_summary: Thirty or more positives uses standard reporting
notes: Full metric reporting deferred

requirement_summary: Production prevalence is planning proxy only and COVID is low-prevalence diagnostic
notes: No real prevalence or outcome analysis is performed

requirement_summary: Domain and purpose macro-averages include labels with at least 10 baseline positives and exclude tags and kappa
notes: Full empirical macro-average calculation remains deferred

requirement_summary: Baseline proportions use 95 percent Wilson score intervals
notes: No Wald interval implementation exists

requirement_summary: Attempt 2000 project-level bootstrap resamples with seed 20260714
notes: Tests use small toy counts and seeds; formal default is 2000

requirement_summary: Keep complete project blocks together and sample with replacement
notes: Repeated Record IDs remain separate sampled units

requirement_summary: Do not top up undefined replicates and track statistic-specific validity
notes: Attempted valid invalid and reasons are retained

requirement_summary: Suppress interval below 90 percent valid replicates
notes: Exactly 90 percent remains reportable

requirement_summary: Calculate percentile intervals from valid replicates only
notes: Hyndman-Fan Type 7 is explicit in protocol v0.15 and equivalent to NumPy/Pandas linear interpolation

requirement_summary: Exclude training demonstration discussion and pilot records
notes: Candidate-0.3 pilot row is decoded for compatibility then excluded

requirement_summary: Missing scratch responses follow dimension common complete-case rule
notes: Missing coder or dimension is fatal only for affected analysis

requirement_summary: Project-owner non-response is reported and not imputed
notes: No owner outcome ingestion

requirement_summary: Owner non-public knowledge is project-informed and does not penalise register model
notes: Owner analysis is deliberately absent

requirement_summary: Missing or uninterpretable dimension values follow the common complete-case rule; a completed response is not converted to missing merely because the frozen structural validator flags it
notes: Fatal missing values remain dimension-labelled while readable structural failures are retained unchanged in the primary analysis

requirement_summary: Readable coherence concerns are retained and flagged
notes: Unclear coexistence and candidate-0.5 fit coherence are examples

requirement_summary: Instrument-inconsistent sensitivity uses the frozen candidate-0.7 validator and excludes complete projects containing any affected formal scratch response
notes: Primary responses are not mutated; declaration owner QA and historical rows are excluded; the report includes affected counts retained population replacement-panel and applicable per-label primary/sensitivity estimates and differences
